mnemonics.title: Clock Types
mnemonics.content: Physical=Real World, Logical=Event Order, Vector=Causal Map

acronyms.usage: Global time standard used in synchronization

visualTips.visualization: Imagine multi-dimensional graph where each axis tracks a node's event count
Picture multiple hourglasses with sand flowing at different rates

analogies.analogy: Like ticket numbers at DMV - order matters more than actual time
Similar to musicians tuning instruments before concert
